concerns: Policy cancelled in 2022 by Zurich Insurance Group.
Increase in claim frequency in 2024 with 11 claims.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Prior insurance history from 2020 to 2024 shows a total of 31 claims. Annual premiums historically ranged from $580k to $630k. Prior carriers included Markel, Zurich, Chubb, and EMPLOYERS. A policy cancellation occurred in 2022.

extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: 2024: 11 claims. 2023 (Markel Corporation): 619820.26 premium, 3 claims. 2022 (Zurich Insurance Group): 607294.45 premium, 6 claims, Cancelled. 2021 (Chubb Limited): 630843.20 premium, 9 claims. 2020 (EMPLOYERS Insurance Group): 580805.53 premium, 2 claims.
